description: Community-submitted low-carbon material manufacturers. Submitted via submit.html and reviewed by admin before status is set to 'approved'.

technologies.name: CO₂ Mineralization
technologies.description: Injection of recycled CO₂ into wet concrete during mixing, permanently sequestering it as calcium carbonate.

technologies.name: CO₂ Curing
technologies.description: Curing precast concrete elements with captured CO₂ instead of steam/water, absorbing CO₂ into the matrix.

technologies.name: SCM Substitution
technologies.description: Replacing Portland cement clinker with supplementary cementitious materials (fly ash, slag, silica fume, calcined clay).

technologies.name: Portland Limestone Cement (PLC)
technologies.description: ASTM C595 inter-ground limestone cement replacing a portion of clinker (5-15% CO₂ reduction).

technologies.name: Novel Binder / Alternative Cement
technologies.description: Non-Portland cement binders including geopolymers, calcium sulfoaluminate, and electrochemical cements.

technologies.name: Electric Arc Furnace (EAF) Steel
technologies.description: Steel production using 100% recycled scrap melted by electric arc, avoiding iron ore reduction and producing ~60-75% less CO₂ than BOF.
